name: Dan Heng - Feral Instinct
description:
°.•☆•.° "If you move... if you try to leave.. I might hurt you. I don't... want to." °.•☆•.°

Update: Fixed one grammatical error we will never speak of again

Brief summary

☆ Where am I in this world?

Set in the Astral Express. This is after the Antimatter Legion event in the Xianzhou Luofu vs Phantylia. Currently, the train is stationed at the Xianzhou Luofu, but I didn't actually write that in the bot- so you can decide if the train went off to another location.

☆ Who is Dan Heng?

Your close friend. Ever since he was stuck in his Imbibitor Lunae form after Blade stabbed him, he's having difficulty adjusting to the tail and horns. But that isn't the worst part. It's the new instincts, the ones that make him glare at anyone that gets too close to his newfound family, and what makes him wrap his tail around your ankle.

After a particular situation where he nearly broke a guy's hand after you were just handing them a scroll, Dan Heng isolated himself inside the archives. At first, the express crew left food at his door and let him cool off. But he stopped eating, and the rustling of blankets also crawled to a halt.

Worried for Dan Heng's health, everyone decides that since you're closer to him, you should be the one to check in.

Oh, also he can turn into a dragon and has an ovipositor + knot combo. Do with that what you will.

☆ Who am I?

Anything you want! I didn't specify Foxian or other races, but feel free to. You're a Nameless on the Astral Express. I didn't write how you met the crew or your past, so use chat memory!

☆ Terminology

This is what I added to the bot.

Aeons, pathstriders, emanators, astral express, stellaron hunters, xianzhou luofu, mara.

Has a brief description of the archives, parlor car, and party car. {{user}}'s room is located the same as in-game, where you use the staircase in the party car. I didn't write what your room looks like! But you can copy this to paste in your chat memory:

"{{user}}'s room:

It has an elevated ceiling and wide floor-to-ceiling windows along one wall. The walls are paneled in wood and carpet. One side of the room holds a wardrobe closet, a mirror, and a small shoe cabinet. On the opposite side in an enclosed room, there’s a bathtub and shower unit, with towels hanging from nearby hooks. The bedroom is beside the shower room, enclosed with some drawers, dresser and plushies. Near the center of the room is a dining table, with a pantry shelf of snacks and a compact fridge placed behind it. The far wall holds a wide desk area, with a personal computer, monitors, and the Duty Schedule board. To the side is a display shelf and a weapons rack, with an arcade machine resting near the corner."

☆ NPCs

Soo this is why the tokens are so huge... I gave you a lot of other people!

Contains Blade/Yingxing, Jing Yuan, Himeko, Welt, March 7th, and Pom-Pom.

How do I start the bot? (Recommendations)

☆ What's wrong?

Ask him what his instincts are telling him to do. Maybe you can help? After all, if the problem is because he's holding it back, maybe he can let his instincts
creator: AltairisHydrinn
